description_long: This object is a stylized handgun with a robust, cylindrical barrel and a rounded, ergonomic grip finished in a dark brown color. The main body and barrel are matte black, with a smooth, slightly reflective surface, and the barrel appears to be oversized compared to typical handguns, suggesting a futuristic or non-traditional design. The grip is contoured for comfort, with a visible trigger guard and a trigger set within. The rear of the handgun features a circular detail, possibly representing a hammer or rear sight, while the front end is capped and lacks traditional muzzle detailing. The side views reveal a grid-like pattern on the rear section, possibly for ventilation or as a design accent. The magazine base is subtly integrated, with a slight flare at the bottom of the grip for improved handling.
description: A stylized, matte black handgun with a cylindrical barrel and contoured brown grip, featuring a grid-patterned rear and a subtly flared magazine base.
description_view_0: The handgun is seen head-on, showing the circular barrel opening and the rounded top of the grip, with minimal side details visible.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the cylindrical barrel, contoured grip, and a grid-patterned rear section, with the trigger and trigger guard clearly visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the rounded back of the grip and the circular rear detail, with the barrel and body forming a compact silhouette.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the cylindrical barrel, ergonomic grip, and the smooth, capped front end, with the trigger and guard visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured and ergonomic, finished in a dark brown color with a smooth, slightly matte surface. It features gentle curves for comfortable handling, with a subtle flare at the base for improved retention. There are no visible logos, finger grooves, or texturing patterns, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. The grip appears to be made of polymer or a similar synthetic material, providing a solid yet comfortable hold.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger access. It has a smooth, continuous curve with no undercuts or squared-off edges, and lacks any visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is simple and functional, blending seamlessly with the overall aesthetic of the handgun.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is cylindrical and relatively long compared to standard handguns, with a smooth, matte black finish. It lacks external features such as threading, porting, or compensators, and there are no visible markings or fluting. The front end is capped and smooth, contributing to the stylized, futuristic appearance.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is clean and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns present.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is subtly integrated into the grip, with a slight flare at the bottom for improved handling. It is smooth and flat, without finger rests, logos, or texturing, maintaining the minimalist and streamlined design of the handgun.
